name: Cracked Crystal Skull
description: Notes This is the easiest UT skull to obtain, but it is as bad as it gets. It gives 5 HP more compared to Essence Tap Skull, but the summon does a bit less damage, and lacks Vampiric Blast. So it’s not advisable to use over any other skull (other than Heartstealer Skull or less tiered ones).
effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Cracked Crystal Undead to fight for you.
Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
